content.en:
Ye Tian swallowed all kinds of resources into his body, and then urged the refining of blood-colored metal.

Immediately after, a special energy poured into his body, refining his dragon scale legendary body.

The dragon scale legend body, which originally needed dragon scale ancient stones and many precious materials to be improved, is actually improving at this moment, although the increase is not fast, but at least it has been improving!

"I can understand why the Chiyan Three-Headed Dragon was able to raise the body of the Supreme Legend, with the resources of the Ancient Ruins of Legends, it should be impossible to raise the body of the Supreme Legend to the realm of perfection, but it did it, it should rely on this innate original treasure!" Ye Tian muttered.

"It's a little strange, two innate primordial treasures, maybe more than two, it is possible that the legend of the ancient ruins is also an innate primordial treasure, or it is possible that other legends have obtained the innate primordial treasure by the Dao realm. But in either case, the legend of the ruins is not simple, and there may have been a special change. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

But those elders are estimated to be unable to know the changes in the legendary ancient ruins, and so many legends to the Dao realm are wandering in the legendary ancient ruins, and they can't notice it, and he can't find it either.

Moreover, legend has it that the ruins were closed not so long ago.

"Forget it, wait for the next time you open it, and then enter the legendary ruins!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

......

In the following days, Ye Tian continued to study this blood-colored metal, and gradually studied something.

For example, the energy that stimulates the blood-colored metal can be quickly restored, increasing speed, strength, and defense, but the increase is not large.

The biggest role of the blood-colored metal is to assist in the cultivation of the legendary body, which can be regarded as an innate primordial treasure of the auxiliary class, but even if it is an innate primordial treasure of the auxiliary class, it can still make his strength skyrocket.

"With this blood-colored metal, I should be able to cultivate the Dragon Scale Legendary Body to the consummation realm, and I don't need to work hard to collect the Dragon Scale Ancient Stone!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Blood-colored metal is a priceless treasure in his eyes, and its value is incalculable.

"Gotta take a name, let's call it the Legendary Blood Treasure!"

With the Legendary Blood Treasure this innate original treasure, Ye Tian was in a very good mood, as long as he cultivated with peace of mind, his strength would be terrifyingly improved.

Next, he began to focus on the eerie statue.

Legend has it that the Blood Treasure can also be studied by drawing on the three dragons of Chiyan, but this strange statue has no revelation at all, and it is even more difficult to study.

However, Ye Tian is not afraid of hurting his body by studying this thing, it is a big deal to change a replica body.

The long years passed.

Ye Tian gradually tried to study again and again, and finally studied the usefulness of this statue's innate original treasure.

He can fuse with this statue, his strength will be terrifyingly improved, and in the fusion state, he can even comprehend the second sequence of the rules of the Dao, although the speed of comprehension is not fast, but in the absence of the second sequence of the rules of the Dao rules, he can slowly improve!

If you get a second-order supreme rule item and then fuse it with the statue for enlightenment, the effect will definitely be better.

"In the future, even if I can't get more second-order supreme dao rules, just relying on this statue, I can rely on a large number of years to comprehend the second-order supreme dao rules to ten percent perfection!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

It can be said that with these two innate original treasures, the future is limitless!

......

Over the years, Ye Tian silently participated in the cultivation of enlightenment.

The second sequence of supreme rules is rising at a slow speed, and the dragon scale legend body is also improving.

And from beginning to end, the news that he had obtained the Innate Origin Treasure was not leaked, otherwise the two Innate Origin Treasures, he even suspected that the elders within the Innate Origin Domain Alliance would attack him.

After all, if the patriarch obtains these two innate primordial treasures, his strength can skyrocket, what is it to kill a legend to the Dao realm?

Therefore, he must be careful not to divulge the innate original treasure.

Fortunately, as long as you don't leak the breath of the innate primordial treasure, it is difficult to be discovered.

Time flies.

Unconsciously, the years of the 100,000 Dao Era have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian's dragon scale legend body broke through and reached the realm of consummation.

His strength has also skyrocketed, and now he is even stronger than Soho before he broke through.

Now, his cultivation is still a little worse, and if his cultivation reaches the peak of the Legend Dao Realm, he can go to the veteran level.

"Cultivation is in a hurry, you have to take your time, and as for the second sequence of supreme rules, they are also steadily improving. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

However, what he wanted to do now was another thing, and that was whether or not to cultivate another Supreme Legendary Body.

In the past, he thought that a legendary Dao realm could only cultivate one legendary body, but later he saw a relevant record in the inheritance book hall of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, that is, there were several ordinary legendary bodies that were cultivated in the Dao realm, and after superimposing, he was no less surprised than a top-level legendary body.

But at the same time, no one has done it yet.

After all, to cultivate a supreme legendary body, one has to prepare a supreme legendary blood, and also has to prepare a large number of precious resources, which force can support such a price?

Therefore, even if it is Soho, he will not cultivate the second supreme legendary body, otherwise it will be a waste of resources.

Moreover, unless the second sect of the Supreme Legendary Body is also cultivated to the consummation realm, a lot of strength can be enhanced, and if you want to greatly improve your strength, you must have at least three or more supreme legendary bodies, and all of them must be promoted to the consummation realm.

In general, the cost is too great to be worth it.

With this resource and effort, isn't it good to become a veteran directly?

But for Ye Tian, it seems that he can cultivate the second supreme legendary body!

The body of the strongest legend, he is not lacking, and he also has the legendary blood treasure, he can improve the body of the legend without the help of corresponding resources, with such an innate original treasure, he can't play its role well, isn't it a waste?

"Then cultivate the second supreme legendary body!"

Ye Tian decided.

Immediately, he took out a copy of the body of the strongest legend.

This is the blood of the strongest legend of the three-headed dragon of Chiyan, and he uses this blood of the strongest legend.

Grunt!

Ye Tian swallowed it in one gulp, and then refined the blood of this supreme legend.

After some time.

Rumble!!!!

A inheritance of the body of the strongest legend was obtained by Ye Tian.

"Red Dragon Legend Body!"

This is the name of this supreme legendary body.

According to the introduction of this Supreme Legendary Body, he needed to collect a lot of precious materials, one of which was a rare material called the Red Dragon Blood Marrow, without it, there was no way to cultivate the Red Dragon Legendary Body.

But now, he didn't need to collect any red dragon blood marrow.
